headline: Baron Booo McShivers Demands Union Rights for All Haunted House Ghosts
summary: Spectral workers want paid spooky time off.
fullBody: Baron Booo McShivers led thousands of ghosts in a chain-rattling protest. 'No more free scares!' they moaned. Demands include better fog machines and dental plans for those with missing teeth. Homeowners are leaving polite notes and extra sheets.
